operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add requirement to strip whitespace from peptide_name and charge_state before constructing keys.
operator_instances.rationale: Real-world CSV data may contain leading/trailing spaces; robust parsing requires trimming to ensure consistent key generation.

new_hidden_tests.description: Row with leading/trailing spaces in peptide name and charge.
new_hidden_tests.call_code:
mapRow(row, header_dict, precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping, protein_mapping)
print(precursors_mapping)
print(sequences_mapping)
print(protein_mapping)

static_checks: Check that .strip() is called on peptide_name and charge_state.
expected_failure_modes: If whitespace is not stripped, keys will contain spaces and peptide_name will have spaces, causing incorrect mapping.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: The downstream scaled case must prove that the function correctly strips whitespace from peptide_name and charge_state.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Keys must be built without leading/trailing spaces.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior would include spaces in keys and mappings.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Row with whitespace around peptide name and charge should produce keys without spaces.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the sanitization requirement.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add requirement to remove duplicate transition entries from transitions and pr_transitions lists while preserving order.
operator_instances.rationale: Biological data may contain redundant transitions; deduplication ensures clean mapping.

new_hidden_tests.description: Row with duplicate fragment and precursor transitions.
new_hidden_tests.call_code:
mapRow(row, header_dict, precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping, protein_mapping)
print(precursors_mapping)
print(sequences_mapping)

static_checks: Check that duplicates are removed (e.g., using dict.fromkeys or set but preserving order).
expected_failure_modes: If duplicates are not removed, the lists will contain repeated entries.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: The downstream scaled case must prove that the function removes duplicate entries from transition lists while preserving order.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Transition lists should contain unique elements in original order.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior would retain duplicates.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Row with duplicate fragment and precursor annotations should yield deduplicated lists.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must expose the deduplication requirement.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add an executable oracle case for the edge condition where fragment annotations are empty (no transitions).
operator_instances.rationale: The function has an early return when transitions list is empty; this edge case should be verified.

new_hidden_tests.description: Row with empty fragment annotation string (or all semicolons leading to empty list).
new_hidden_tests.call_code:
mapRow(row, header_dict, precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping, protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)
print('Protein Mapping:', protein_mapping)

expected_failure_modes: If the function does not return early, it will attempt to process empty transitions and might cause errors or populate mappings incorrectly.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: The downstream scaled case must prove that the function correctly returns early when fragment transitions are absent.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: When transitions list is empty after splitting, the function returns without modifying any mapping.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior may populate mappings with empty lists or error.

input_variant.value: row with no valid fragment transitions

semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Row with empty fragment annotation should leave all mappings empty.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must verify early return on empty transitions.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add an executable oracle case for charge state being 'NA' or empty, ensuring default to '0'.
operator_instances.rationale: The function has default logic for charge state; this edge case should be verified to ensure correct key generation.

new_hidden_tests.call_code:
mapRow(row, header_dict, precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping, protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)

expected_failure_modes: If charge defaulting is not implemented, keys will contain 'NA' instead of '0'.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: The downstream scaled case must prove that the function defaults charge to '0' when 'NA' or empty.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Key should use '0' as charge state for 'NA' or empty charge.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior might leave charge as 'NA' in key.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Row with charge 'NA' should produce keys with '/0'.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must verify default charge handling.
